title: YouTube Poop: Spingeville
description: [EPILEPSY / SOUND WARNING] Here it is, yet another Spingebill YouTube Poop. I began work on this YTP in early 2014, and finally got around to finishing it. Many of my viewers will recognize that this is the completed work of the "Preview" I uploaded around then. This was originally intended to be It's Rip Snortin' Time! - 3, but I've decided to make this work independent of the series. The primary reason is the lack of Sandy in the episode, and the general lack of sentence mixing potential.
